scenes.visual: Dark coffee-brown background fades in. Animated alarm clock SVG scales in from zero with spring pop, rings with a vibration effect. Sun arc SVG rises slowly from the bottom edge.
Flat illustrated character in tired state — half-closed eyes, slumped posture. Scene is desaturated grey-brown. Character bobs up and down subtly with interpolate.
Coffee can SVG slides in from the right with a spring overshoot pop. Scene color shifts — amber and cold blue flood in from the sides. Character turns to look at the can.
scenes.color_mood: color-shift — amber and cold blue emerge

scenes.visual: Character snaps upright in alert state. Sparkle/star SVGs burst outward from the can in a radial pattern. Background fills to warm amber. Can pulses with a subtle glow.
scenes.color_mood: full energy — amber dominant, cold blue accents

scenes.visual: Clean off-white background. Text animates in per-word: 'Upgrade Your Morning.' Can SVG fades in centered below the text. Amber CTA button scales up from zero.
